content.text:

执行完后检查退出码，如果是1（cookie过期）则用 headed 模式打开 TAPD 登录页，等待主人扫码。退出码0则静默完成即可，不需要通知主人。
Current time: Wednesday, June 10th, 2026 - 10:30 (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-06-10 02:30 UTC

Return your response as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.thinking: Exit code 1 means cookie expired. Per instructions, I need to use headed mode to open the TAPD login page and wait for the user to scan the QR code. Let me open the TAPD login page in a headed browser.

content.text: Cookie过期，退出码1。按指示打开 headed 模式 TAPD 登录页，等待主人扫码。

content.thinking: The Edge browser should have opened the TAPD login page. The user can now scan the QR code to log in. I'll report this as plain text per the instructions. Since the task said to not notify the user on exit code 0, but on exit code 1 the instruction says "等待主人扫码" (wait for master to scan QR code), which implies the user should know. Let me just return a brief status message.

content.text: TAPD 保活检测到会话过期（退出码1），已打开 Edge 浏览器跳转到 TAPD 登录页，请扫码登录。
